postie.mcpServer.label: Postie MCP Server
postie.walkthrough.gettingStarted.title: Getting Started with Postie
postie.walkthrough.gettingStarted.descri: Learn how to use Postie to catch, view, and manage emails directly within VS Code.
Postie is an email catcher server that runs in the background, allowing you to view emails, attachments, and preview emails in different screen sizes directly within VS Code.
Configure your application to use Postie

To start using Postie, you need to configure your application to send emails to the Postie SMTP server. You can configure the SMTP server port in the [Postie settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22postie%22).

Navigate to the primary sidebar and click on the Postie icon to view all received emails. From there, you can click on any email to see its details, access attachments, and download the email as an .eml file.
To ensure your emails look fantastic on every device, preview them in tablet, mobile, and desktop views. For clicking on a link, press CMD and click simultaneously.
Access quick commands by pressing `Cmd+P` (Mac) or `Ctrl+P` (Windows/Linux) and typing 'Postie' to start, stop, restart the server, or delete emails.
postie.walkthrough.mcpGuide.title: Use Postie MCP in VS Code
postie.walkthrough.mcpGuide.description: Connect VS Code chat tools to Postie and inspect emails by id, screenshots, and compatibility checks.
postie.walkthrough.mcpGuide.steps.prereq: Use a VS Code build with MCP support, install Postie, and make sure at least one email is captured.
postie.walkthrough.mcpGuide.steps.enable: Open the Command Palette and run `MCP: List Servers`, then enable `Postie MCP Server`.
postie.walkthrough.mcpGuide.steps.discov: In VS Code chat tool configuration, enable Postie tools including `list_emails`, `get_email`, `capture_email_screenshot`, and compatibility tools.
postie.walkthrough.mcpGuide.steps.debugW: Ask chat to list emails, copy an `emailId`, inspect details, run compatibility checks, then generate screenshots from `capture_email_screenshot`.
postie.walkthrough.mcpGuide.steps.settin: Configure [Postie settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22postie%22) like `postie.compatibilityClients` and `postie.screenshotPresets` to control MCP defaults.
postie.configuration.title: Postie
Allow external emails to be received
postie.configuration.showNewEmailNotific: Show notification when new email arrives
postie.configuration.compatibilityClient: Email clients to test compatibility. The default is set to test compatibility with Apple Mail, Gmail, and Outlook. Do you want to set a different client? [Check the list of supported clients](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@jsx-email/doiuse-email#emailclients)
postie.configuration.screenshotPresets.m: Allowed screenshot preset IDs for MCP screenshot capture. Legacy aliases `desktop`, `tablet`, and `mobile` remain supported for compatibility.
postie.configuration.mcpStoragePath.desc: Override Postie MCP storage path. If unset, Postie will auto-discover and prompt when multiple folders are found.
Automatically run the server on startup
postie.configuration.maxStoredEmailsCoun: Maximum number of emails to store
postie.configuration.maxEmailSize.descri: Maximum email size in bytes default is 1MB
postie.viewsWelcome.incomingEmails.conte: Welcome to Postie! Click the play button to start the server.
